ticket.title: FIX ENCOUNTERED ERROR WHEN CURRENCY CHANGED AND THE NATIONALITY WAS NOT ABLE TO CHANGE

test_cases.description: Verify Nationality dropdown works correctly before any currency change (baseline).
test_cases.expected_result: Dropdown populates with a full country list and allows selection normally.
test_cases.actual_result: Nationality dropdown populated with the full country list and allowed normal selection under the default currency.
test_cases.comments: Baseline confirmed working prior to reproducing the reported issue.

test_cases.description: Verify Nationality dropdown after changing currency (core bug reproduction).
test_cases.expected_result: Dropdown still populates with the full country list and allows a value to be selected/changed without error.
test_cases.actual_result: After changing currency, the Nationality dropdown populated correctly and a country could be selected without error.
test_cases.comments: Fix confirmed - dropdown no longer breaks on currency change.

test_cases.description: Verify no console/network errors are thrown on currency change.
test_cases.expected_result: No errors in console; any country-list API call tied to currency change returns successfully (200).
test_cases.actual_result: No JS console errors observed; country-list API call returned 200 successfully after currency change.
test_cases.comments: Verified via DevTools Console and Network tabs.

test_cases.description: Verify behavior when Nationality was already selected, then currency is changed.
test_cases.expected_result: Previously selected nationality either remains intact, or if reset, the dropdown is still fully functional and re-selectable - never left in a broken/unselectable state.
test_cases.actual_result: Previously selected nationality value remained intact after the currency change; dropdown stayed fully functional.
test_cases.comments: No reset or corruption of existing selection observed.

test_cases.description: Verify multiple currency changes in succession don't compound the issue.
test_cases.expected_result: Dropdown remains functional after multiple rapid/successive currency changes.
test_cases.actual_result: Dropdown remained functional and selectable even after switching currency twice in succession (PHP to USD to SGD).
test_cases.comments: No degradation observed with repeated triggers.

test_cases.description: Verify Passport Issue Country dropdown (adjacent field) is not similarly affected.
test_cases.expected_result: Passport Issue Country dropdown also populates and functions correctly - confirms whether the bug is isolated to Nationality or affects all country-list dropdowns on the form.
test_cases.actual_result: Passport Issue Country dropdown populated and functioned correctly after currency change, consistent with the Nationality field.
test_cases.comments: Confirms the underlying fix covers shared country-list component, not just Nationality.

test_cases.description: Verify fix works across all supported currencies.
test_cases.expected_result: Nationality dropdown works correctly regardless of which currency is selected.
test_cases.actual_result: Nationality dropdown worked correctly across all supported currency options tested.

test_cases.description: Verify fix works across multiple passenger entries (Passenger #2, #3, etc.).
test_cases.expected_result: Nationality dropdown works correctly for all passenger entries, not only the first.
test_cases.actual_result: Nationality dropdown worked correctly for Passenger #2 and subsequent passenger entries after currency change.
test_cases.comments: Fix applies consistently across all passenger blocks.

test_cases.description: Verify currency change does not block form submission after Nationality is set.
test_cases.expected_result: Form submits successfully with the selected Nationality value correctly saved/passed to the next step (no validation error, no reversion to blank).
test_cases.actual_result: Form submitted successfully with the selected Nationality value correctly carried through to the next step; no validation error or blank reversion.
